name: rest-api-design
description: Design and review HTTP REST APIs — resource-oriented URLs, PATCH for state transitions (not sub-resource verbs), domain-expressive error codes, flat error envelopes, cursor/offset pagination, idempotency keys on side-effectful POSTs, content-type negotiation including NDJSON/SSE/vendor types, patch format selection (plain JSON / merge-patch / json-patch), typed contracts across TypeScript/Python/Go/Rust, and reviewer-grade output conventions with severity tagging.
